title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-import to v2.14.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| eslint-plugin-import | devDependencies | minor | `2.9.0` -> `2.14.0` | [source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>benmosher/eslint-plugin-import</summary>

### [`v2.14.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2140---2018-08-13)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/compare/v2.13.0...v2.14.0)

-   [`69e0187`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/commit/69e0187) (HEAD -> master, source/master, origin/master, origin/HEAD) Merge pull request [#​1151](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/issues/1151) from jf248/jsx
    |\\  
    | \* [`e30a757`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/commit/e30a757) (source/pr/1151, fork/jsx) Add JSX check to namespace rule
    |/  
-   [`8252344`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/commit/8252344) (source/pr/1148) Add error to output when module loaded as resolver has invalid API

##### Added

-   [`no-useless-path-segments`]: add commonJS (CJS) support ([#​1128], thanks [@​1pete])
-   [`namespace`]: add JSX check ([#​1151], thanks [@​jf248])

##### Fixed

-   [`no-cycle`]: ignore Flow imports ([#​1126], thanks [@​gajus])
-   fix Flow type imports ([#​1106], thanks [@​syymza])
-   [`no-relative-parent-imports`]: resolve paths ([#​1135], thanks [@​chrislloyd])
-   [`import/order`]: fix autofixer when using typescript-eslint-parser ([#​1137], thanks [@​justinanastos])
-   repeat fix from [#​797] for [#​717], in another place (thanks [@​ljharb])

##### Refactors

-   add explicit support for RestElement alongside ExperimentalRestProperty (thanks [@​ljharb])

### [`v2.13.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2130---2018-06-24)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/compare/v2.12.0...v2.13.0)

##### Added

-   Add ESLint 5 support ([#​1122], thanks [@​ai] and [@​ljharb])
-   Add [`no-relative-parent-imports`] rule: disallow relative imports from parent directories ([#​1093], thanks [@​chrislloyd])

##### Fixed

-   `namespace` rule: ensure it works in eslint 5/ecmaVersion 2018 (thanks [@​ljharb])

### [`v2.12.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2120---2018-05-17)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/compare/v2.11.0...v2.12.0)

##### Added

-   Ignore type imports for [`named`] rule ([#​931], thanks [@​mattijsbliek])
-   Add documentation for [`no-useless-path-segments`] rule ([#​1068], thanks [@​manovotny])
-   `packageDir` option for [`no-extraneous-dependencies`] can be array-valued ([#​1085], thanks [@​hulkish])

### [`v2.11.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2110---2018-04-09)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/compare/v2.10.0...v2.11.0)

##### Added

-   Fixer for [`first`] \([#​1046], thanks [@​fengkfengk])
-   `allow-require` option for [`no-commonjs`] rule ([#​880], thanks [@​futpib])

##### Fixed

-   memory/CPU regression where ASTs were held in memory ([#​1058], thanks [@​klimashkin]/[@​lukeapage])

### [`v2.10.0`](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​2100---2018-03-29)

[Compare Source](https://renovatebot.com/gh/benmosher/eslint-plugin-import/compare/v2.9.0...v2.10.0)

##### Added

-   Autofixer for [`order`] rule ([#​908], thanks [@​tihonove])
-   Add [`no-cycle`] rule: reports import cycles.

</details>
